label: Order Entry
description: Buy/sell order form with side, quantity, price, strategy linking, and pre-trade constraint validation.

l0.notes: 0.1–0.5 PASS. 0.6 GAP: TerminalData context exposes no isLoading field; widget cannot show skeleton without context change. 0.7 PASS: form renders with defaults; isBatchMode message shown. 0.8 GAP: context exposes no error field; submit errors handled via FormWidget/useFormSubmit only. 0.9 FIXED: removed unused Target and Zap lucide imports.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS: all data from useTerminalData(). 1.2 PASS: use-terminal-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 PASS: organizationIds drives isContextComplete. 1.4 PASS: clientIds drives isContextComplete. 1.5 PASS: strategyIds filters strategies and maps instrument selection. 1.6 PASS: empty strategyIds returns all strategies. 1.7 PASS: STRATEGIES from lib/strategy-registry; DEFAULT_INSTRUMENTS fallback in hook (acceptable location).

knownIssues: TerminalData context missing isLoading and error fields — widgets cannot implement L0.6/L0.8 without context change (blocked on context owner)
DEFAULT_INSTRUMENTS fallback lives in use-terminal-page-data.ts rather than lib/constants/ — low-risk but minor L1.7 placement gap
findings: FIXED: Removed unused Target and Zap lucide-react imports (L0.9)
GAP: No isLoading field in TerminalData context — loading skeleton cannot be added without context change
GAP: No error field in TerminalData context — data-loading error cannot be surfaced without context change
